docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-22-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE MOVING PARTY HAS FAILED WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS OF JUNE 13, 2013 AND JULY 10, 2013 TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR7489.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED OCT-08-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRONE JR, CARL RUSSELL

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 6, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY IS GIVEN ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-13-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF COURT COSTS FOR WHICH A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS MUST BE FILED. PLAINTIFF MUST PREPARE A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRONE JR, CARL RUSSELL $2,889.95 PRINCIPAL, $453.68 INTEREST, $336.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,679.63, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHOULD PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING PAPERS BY JUNE 21, 2013, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted. Motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order granting the motion submitted with the moving papers, with the exception of court costs for which a memorandum of costs must be filed. Plaintiff must prepare a separate proposed Judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC's motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is off calendar because moving party has failed with the Court's orders of June 13, 2013 and July 10, 2013 to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to August 6, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party is given one last opportunity to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Continued To Jul-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to July 10, 2013 to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party should provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers by June 21, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The failure to provide the papers may result in the motion being denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
